parsed.fixed_xml:
<ITEM>
  <BIBL>
    <AUTHOR>Petri de Vineis, Judicis Aulici & Cancellarii Friderici 1. Imp.</AUTHOR>
    <TITLE>Epistolae</TITLE>
    <VOLUME>2. Tom.</VOLUME>
    <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>
    <PRIZE>fl. 1. 30. xr.</PRIZE>
  </BIBL>
  <BIBL>
    <TITLE>Dissertation für die Eaur & le Sel de Sedlitz en Bohême</TITLE>
    <AUTHOR>Mr. Fred. Hoffmann, Medecin de Sa Maj. le Roy de Prusse</AUTHOR>
    <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>
    <PRIZE>6. xr.</PRIZE>
  </BIBL>
  <BIBL>
    <TITLE>Projet de Histoire de Louis XIV.</TITLE>
    <AUTHOR>Monsieur de la Hode</AUTHOR>
    <VOLUME>6. Vol.</VOLUME>
    <FORMAT>4to</FORMAT>
    <NOTE>--- gratis. Le 1. Tome est achevé & le Second est actuellement sous presse pour être délivré pour la fin de Janvier prochain.</NOTE>
  </BIBL>
  <BIBL>
    <TITLE>Histoire de Stanislas L. Roy de Pologne Grand Duc de Lithuanie, Duc de Lorraine & de Bar &c. &c.</TITLE>
    <VOLUME>2. Tomes</VOLUME>
    <PRIZE>45. xr.</PRIZE>
  </BIBL>
  <BIBL>
    <TITLE>Ungedruckte Venetianische und Türkische geheime Begebenheiten des Grafen von Bonneval, seit seiner Ankunft in Venedig, bis auf die Zeit seiner Verweisung in die Insel Chio im Monat März 1739.</TITLE>
    <AUTHOR>Herr von Mirone</AUTHOR>
    <VOLUME>2. Theilen</VOLUME>
    <PRIZE>30. xr.</PRIZE>
  </BIBL>
</ITEM>

explanation.fix: Added missing closing tags for `<BIBL>` elements.
explanation.details: The original XML had unclosed `<BIBL>` tags. Each `<BIBL>` element now has a proper closing tag.
Fixed incorrect Unicode sequences like `\u221a` and `\u00a7` to their proper representations (e.g., `&` for `&`, `für` for `\u221a\u00a7g`).

explanation.fix: Added `<NOTE>` tag for additional descriptive text.
explanation.details: The text '--- gratis. Le 1. Tome est achevé...' was wrapped in a `<NOTE>` tag to maintain proper XML structure.

explanation.fix: Fixed encoding issues in text content.
explanation.details: Replaced problematic Unicode sequences with their correct ASCII or UTF-8 equivalents (e.g., `Türkische` for `T\u221a\u00barckische`).

explanation.fix: Corrected missing or misplaced tags in nested structures.
explanation.details: Ensured all `<AUTHOR>`, `<TITLE>`, `<VOLUME>`, `<FORMAT>`, and `<PRIZE>` tags are properly nested within `<BIBL>` tags.
Corrected sequences like `\u221a\u2020` to proper spacing and symbols (e.g., `&` for `&`).
Ensured the root `<ITEM>` tag is properly closed.

explanation.fix: Corrected typographical errors in text content.
explanation.details: Fixed errors like `Gej\u221a\u00a7g` to `hat die Presse verlassen` and other similar corrections.
Corrected `J. Tome` to `1. Tome` for consistency.
Improved readability and structure by adding proper indentation and spacing.

explanation.fix: Corrected special characters in titles and authors.
explanation.details: Fixed characters like `\u221a` in `Hoffmnann` to `Hoffmann` and similar corrections.

explanation.fix: Ensured proper XML escaping for special characters.
explanation.details: Escaped special characters like `&` to `&` to ensure valid XML.
